name: Azimut Exploration Inc.
description: Azimut Exploration Inc. is a data-driven mineral exploration company with the largest mineral exploration portfolio in Quebec, focused on gold, copper, nickel, and lithium targets. The company uses its proprietary AZtechMine™ big-data analytics methodology to identify large-scale mineral systems, with flagship projects including Elmer and Wabamisk in the James Bay region, and partnerships with Rio Tinto and KGHM.
